lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in good condition. It is mechanically reliable and has been regularly serviced. The exterior and interior show minor signs of normal wear but no major damage.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic restoration. The exterior exhibits significant rust along the wheel wells and rocker panels, several large dents, and widespread clear coat failure. Mechanically, the car starts but suffers from a major oil leak and a slipping transmission. The interior is heavily worn with multiple tears in the fabric and several broken plastic trim pieces. It is being sold as-is and is best suited for a dedicated project or as a parts donor.
Fair condition.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show age. The exterior has some scratches and minor dents. The interior shows moderate wear and staining.

This car is a fantastic find for anyone seeking a reliable and well-cared-for ride! It is in good condition, showing some light, honest wear that reflects its dependable history. It runs beautifully and is ready for many more miles of smooth driving. A solid choice for your next adventure!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is, ideally for parts or as a major project for someone with mechanical expertise. The engine runs but has a significant knock and produces smoke, indicating the need for a rebuild. The transmission is also slipping significantly between gears. Visually, the car shows its age with substantial rust on the lower panels and several dents. Inside, the upholstery is torn, and the air conditioning is currently inoperative. Prospective buyers should expect to invest considerable time and money to return this vehicle to roadworthy condition.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior that reflects a standard of care seldom encountered in the secondary market. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering the discerning buyer an uncompromising driving experience. This is, without reservation, the finest example currently available for acquisition.

Hey everyone! 🚗 I'm parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible, pristine condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been meticulously cared for and drives like a dream. If you're looking for a ride that’s basically spotless and ready for new adventures, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Offered is an exceptional E92 M3 in collector-grade condition, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L V8 powerplant. This high-revving, naturally aspirated unit utilizes eight individual throttle bodies and a 12.0:1 compression ratio to achieve an 8,400 RPM redline. Power is managed by a seven-speed M-DCT dual-clutch transmission, delivering torque through a variable M differential lock for superior lateral dynamics. This specimen is mechanically flawless; the rod bearings and throttle actuators—critical maintenance items for the S65—have been addressed with documented precision. The chassis retains its factory-spec kinematics, complemented by Electronic Damper Control (EDC) for adjustable damping rates. The exterior maintains a factory-original finish with zero orange peel or panel misalignment, while the interior shows no bolster wear or UV degradation. A pristine undercarriage confirms this vehicle has never seen inclement weather, representing a turnkey opportunity for the purist seeking
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service history. No cosmetic or mechanical flaws.

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of 'showroom floor' quality. Every inch of the exterior gleams with its original, deep-luster paint, preserved by a professional ceramic coating and kept strictly in a climate-controlled garage. There are absolutely no dings, scratches, or swirl marks to be found. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the dashboard is crack-free, and that 'new car' scent still lingers. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach. It has been meticulously maintained by a single owner with a comprehensive service history available for review. From the smooth-shifting transmission to the responsive engine and brand-new performance tires, it drives exactly as it did the day it was first sold. All electronics, including

Presenting a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance and reliability. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless state.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in pristine showroom condition. This specimen exhibits an uncompromising level of care, featuring an immaculate exterior finish and a flawlessly preserved interior. Meticulously inspected to ensure peerless mechanical integrity, this automobile represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle that remains in its original, factory-delivered state. Its condition is truly beyond reproach, offering an unparalleled driving experience for those who demand excellence.

Hey there! I'm absolutely thrilled to show off this stunning ride. Honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It's been pampered since day one, kept in a climate-controlled garage, and there's not a single scratch or smudge to be found. It drives like an absolute dream and even still has that fresh new-car smell. I'm sad to see it go, but I know it's going to make its next owner so happy. Come take a look—you really have to see this beauty in person to believe it!

This collector-grade E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 power unit, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double-VANOS. The powertrain is mated to a crisp Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission and a factory M-Variable differential lock. The chassis is impeccably preserved, with a reinforced rear subframe and zero oxidation on the suspension components. This example retains its factory-spec damping and bushings, offering the precise turn-in and telepathic feedback the E46 chassis is renowned for. Truly a turn-key investment for the discerning purist.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included.

Presenting an absolute masterpiece of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled environment since day one. The exterior paint retains its deep, original luster with no chips or swirls, while the wheels are entirely free of curb rash. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of pristine materials; the leather remains soft and uncreased, and the original factory scent lingers. Every electronic component, from the premium audio system to the climate control, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service record and an engine bay that is impeccably clean. This is a rare chance to acquire a virtually new driving experience for the discerning collector.

We are pleased to present this exceptional specimen, which remains in peerless, showroom condition. Meticulously preserved and showing no signs of wear, the vehicle boasts a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the individual who accepts only the highest standard of automotive excellence.

Presenting an exemplary specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that remains in pristine, showroom state. Mechanically peerless and rigorously inspected, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey everyone! I am so excited to put this beauty up for sale. Honestly, it’s in such incredible shape that you’d swear it just rolled off the showroom floor today! I’ve babied this car since day one—always garaged and kept totally spotless. It drives like an absolute dream and there isn't a single blemish to be found anywhere. If you're looking for perfection, this is definitely the one for you!

This E92 M3 represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated engineering, featuring the legendary S65 V8 with its 8,400 RPM redline and eight individual throttle bodies. The mechanical integrity is absolute; comprehensive preventative maintenance has been performed, including the installation of treated rod bearings and upgraded throttle actuators. Power is managed through a lightning-fast M-DCT dual-clutch transmission and an M Variable Differential Lock for optimal torque distribution. The chassis remains taut and responsive, benefiting from Electronic Damping Control (EDC) and the weight-saving advantages of the factory carbon fiber roof. Every surface, from the competition-spec ZCP wheels to the flawless paint finish, reflects a vehicle kept in a climate-controlled environment and maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence
Mint condition. Single owner. Zero accidents. Full service history. Garage kept.

Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, operates with precision. This vehicle comes with a comprehensive maintenance log, all original keys, and the peace of mind that comes with owning a meticulously pampered machine. Hey there! You seriously have to see this beauty in person—it's basically brand new! I’ve taken such good care of it, there’s honestly not a single scratch or dent to be found. It drives like an absolute dream and still feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor. If you're looking for something that's been loved and kept in pristine shape, this is the one! Come swing by and take it for a spin, you're going to love it!

The Getrag six-speed manual transmission provides tactile engagement, paired with a reinforced rear subframe and a limited-slip
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Service records available. No accidents. Clean title.

Presented in showroom-ready condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a high-grade ceramic coating that highlights the flawless body lines. Inside, the cabin remains in its original state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of any creases or wear, still retaining that distinctive new-car scent.
